title: syzygium maingayi
intro: Syzygium maingayi, also known as the Malay apple or mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Syzygium maingayi include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the fruit, leaves, and bark of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed fresh or dried for its medicinal properties.
